specific_question: In Q4 2024, how did post-visit confusion about billing and next steps affect MediConn's customer satisfaction scores?
answer: Results of a MediConn Solutions patient questionnaire completed in October 2024 showed that, so far in Q4 2024, patients who contacted support and were confused about billing rated their experience 3.2/5 on average, compared to 4.5/5 for patients who didn't need post-visit clarification. Clear billing explanations during support calls raised scores to 4.1/5.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
